name: Devilish Marshmallow Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Cream shortening; gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and cocoa; add to creamed mixture, mixing well. Stir in flavorings. Chill dough for at least 30 minutes. Shape dough into 1-inch balls; place on greased cookie sheets. Bake at 350°F for 7 minutes. Place a marshmallow half on top of each cookie; bake an additional 2 minutes. Cool on wire racks, and spread frosting over tops.
Frosting:
Combine first 3 ingredients in a saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until chocolate melts. Add powdered sugar, and beat until smooth. Add additional milk to frosting mixture if needed for proper spreading consistency.
